SqlInput: SELECT * FROM Users
SELECT Id FROM Users
SELECT Id, Name FROM Users
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Select(x => new { Id = x.Id, Name = x.Name }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Id, Name, Age FROM Users
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Select(x => new { Id = x.Id, Name = x.Name, Age = x.Age }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Age > 18
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Age < 18
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Age >= 18
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Age <= 18
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Age = 18
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Age <> 18
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name = 'Admin'
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Role <> 'Guest'
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Points > Bonus
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Age >= 18 AND Role = 'Admin'
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Age >= 18 OR Role = 'Admin'
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE (Points > 100 OR Bonus > 50) AND Age < 30
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Points + Bonus >= 150
select * from users
SELECT  * FROM  Users

Desc: Szóközök hiánya az operátorok és vesszők körül.
SqlInput: SELECT Name,Age FROM Users WHERE Age>18
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => x.Age > 18).Select(x => new { Name = x.Name, Age = x.Age }).ToList()

Desc: Szóközök a szövegen belül és sortörés.
SqlInput:
SELECT * FROM Users 
WHERE Name = 'Nagy Peti'

SELECT Name FROM Users 
WHERE Age >= 21
SELECT * FROM Users ORDER BY Age
SELECT * FROM Users ORDER BY Age DESC
SELECT Name FROM Users ORDER BY Age DESC, Name ASC
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.OrderByDescending(x => x.Age).ThenBy(x => x.Name).Select(x => new { Name = x.Name }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name LIKE 'A%'
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name LIKE '%a'
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name LIKE '%a%'
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name LIKE 'B%b'
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name LIKE 'B%%%%%b'
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name LIKE 'B_b'
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name LIKE '___'
SELECT * FROM Users GROUP BY Role

Desc: Group By kulcs lekérése explicit alias nélkül.
SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users GROUP BY Role

Desc: Sima oszlop lekérése Group By után.
SqlInput: SELECT Name FROM Users GROUP BY Role

Desc: Group By kulcs és nem-kulcs oszlop vegyesen.
SqlInput: SELECT Role, Points FROM Users GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, Points = g.FirstOrDefault().Points }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role AS Feladatkor FROM Users GROUP BY Role
SELECT Role FROM Users WHERE Age > 20 GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => x.Age > 20).GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Age BETWEEN 20 AND 30
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Points + Bonus BETWEEN 50 AND 150
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE NOT Age = 18
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE NOT (Age < 18 OR Points < 10)
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name NOT LIKE 'A%'
SELECT * FROM Users ORDER BY Age
SELECT * FROM Users ORDER BY Points DESC
SELECT * FROM Users ORDER BY Role ASC, Age DESC
SELECT Role FROM Users GROUP BY Role

Desc: Group By kulccsal és aggregációval (AS alias).
SqlInput: SELECT Role, COUNT(Id) AS Db FROM Users GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, Db = g.Count() }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Users GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, Total = g.Count() }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role, SUM(Points) AS OsszPont FROM Users GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, OsszPont = g.Sum(x => x.Points) }).ToList()

Desc: Group By MIN és MAX aggregációval egyszerre.
SqlInput: SELECT Role, MIN(Age) AS MinKor, MAX(Age) AS MaxKor FROM Users GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, MinKor = g.Min(x => x.Age), MaxKor = g.Max(x => x.Age) }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users GROUP BY Role HAVING COUNT(*) > 2
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Where(g => g.Count() > 2).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users GROUP BY Role HAVING SUM(Points) >= 100
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Where(g => g.Sum(x => x.Points) >= 100).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

Desc: WHERE és GROUP BY és ORDER BY kombinációja.
SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users WHERE Age > 18 GROUP BY Role ORDER BY Role DESC
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => x.Age > 18).GroupBy(x => x.Role).OrderByDescending(g => g.Key).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

Desc: Teljes lánc: WHERE, GROUP BY, HAVING, ORDER BY.
SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users WHERE Age >= 18 GROUP BY Role HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY Role ASC
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => x.Age >= 18).GroupBy(x => x.Role).Where(g => g.Count() > 1).OrderBy(g => g.Key).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users GROUP BY Role HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND SUM(Bonus) > 10
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Where(g => g.Count() > 1 && g.Sum(x => x.Bonus) > 10).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Name AS Nev, Age AS Kor FROM Users ORDER BY Kor DESC
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.OrderByDescending(x => x.Age).Select(x => new { Nev = x.Name, Kor = x.Age }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Age NOT BETWEEN 20 AND 30
